zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal於大約1095年出生在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯時，她的父親Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha30歲，母親Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal16歲。她於1119年與Sancho Núñez de Celanova在葡萄牙布拉加結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1163年在葡萄牙享年69歲，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal于大约1095年出生在葡萄牙布拉加吉馬奧斯时，她的父亲Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha30岁，母亲Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal16岁。她于1119年与Sancho Núñez de Celanova在葡萄牙布拉加结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1163年在葡萄牙享年69岁，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞。

nameMeanings.name: Henriques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Fernando, Mario, Adolfo, Adriano, Americo, Augusto, Julio, Adelino.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Aderito, Afonso, Agostinho, Duarte, Henrique, Paulo.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Henrique, Portuguese form of Henry .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Portuguese surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: English, French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Jamaica and Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’, introduced to England by the Normans in the form Henri. During the Middle Ages this name became enormously popular in England and was borne by eight kings. Continental forms of the personal name were equally popular throughout Europe. In the period in which the majority of English surnames were formed, a common English vernacular form of the name was Harry, hence the surnames Harris (southern) and Harrison (northern). Official documents of the period normally used the Latinized form Henricus. In medieval times, English Henry absorbed an originally distinct Old English personal name that had hagan ‘hawthorn’ (compare Hain 2) as its first element, and there has also been confusion with Amery. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Heinrich , and also their derivatives, e.g. Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ). Compare Henri .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hInnéirghe ‘descendant of Innéirghe’, a byname based on éirghe ‘arising’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Éinrí or Mac Einri, patronymics from the personal names Éinrí, Einri, Irish forms of Henry. It is also found as a variant of McEnery .

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal was born about 1095, in Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, her father, Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha, was 30 and her mother, Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, was 16. She married Sancho Núñez de Celanova in 1119, in Braga, Portugal. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1163, in Portugal, at the age of 69, and was buried in Galicia, Spain.

fr.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal est née environ 1095, à Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, son père, Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sancho Núñez de Celanova en 1119, à Braga, Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1163, à Portugal, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Galicia, Espagne.

de.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal um 1095 in Guimarães, Braga, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha 30 und ihre Mutter Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal 16. Sie hat 1119 in Braga, Portugal Sancho Núñez de Celanova geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1163 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Portugal und wurde in Galicia, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal è nata il circa 1095 nel Guimarães, Braga, Portogallo, sua padre, Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sancho Núñez de Celanova nel 1119, nel Braga, Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1163, nel Portogallo, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Galicia, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugalが約1095年にポルトガルブラガグイマルaスで生まれた時，父Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonhaは30歳，母Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugalは16歳であった。1119年にポルトガルブラガでSancho Núñez de Celanovaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1163年にポルトガルで69歳で死去し，スペインガリシアにて埋葬された。

ko.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o 애스토르가
ko.lifeSummary: Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal(이)가 대략 1095년 포르투갈 브라가 길마a스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1119년 포르투갈 브라가에서 Sancho Núñez de Celanova(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1163년 포르투갈에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 갈리샤에 묻혔다.

pt.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, seu pai, Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sancho Núñez de Celanova em 1119, em Braga, Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1163, em Portugal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Galicia, Espanha.

ru.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: асторга, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal родилась около 1095 г. в местности гуимарaесь, брага, Португалия, её отцу по имени Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sancho Núñez de Celanova в 1119 г. в местности брага, Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1163 г. в местности Португалия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности галися, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal nació aproximadamente 1095, en Guimarães, Braga, Portugal, su papá, Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sancho Núñez de Celanova en 1119, en Braga, Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1163, en Portugal, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Galicia, España.
